title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management B2B SaaS company backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience aligns perfectly with Head of RevOps role requiring 7+ years at scale; Finout's cloud cost management focus and $85M+ funding stage match target GTM/fintech profile; Tel Aviv HQ enables optimal collaboration.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed Finout is scaling beyond $30M ARR in cloud cost management—a space where revenue operations excellence directly drives GTM efficiency. With 15+ years building RevOps functions in high-growth B2B SaaS, including scaling Salesforce operations and cross-functional revenue analytics across Sales, Marketing, and Finance, I've seen firsthand how the right operational backbone unlocks predictable growth. Your Tel Aviv HQ + NY hybrid setup caught my attention, as I'm looking for a hands-on Head of RevOps role where I can directly impact a well-funded, mission-driven team.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy to serve as a partner for Sales and RevOps, providing dashboards, reporting tools, and regional insights to optimize territory performance. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership and Finance on territory composition, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in Salesforce and Fullcast. Requires a deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills in Excel/SQL/BI tools, and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Exceptional match: RevOps Manager role aligns perfectly with Omri's senior GTM experience, requires core competencies (Salesforce, B2B SaaS, territory optimization, pipeline forecasting) that are his strengths, and remote/global location fits his flexibility. The territory strategy focus leverages his deep revenue operations background.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years optimizing revenue engines at B2B SaaS companies, and your Territory Strategy & Operations role at Gong caught my attention. I've redesigned territory models from scratch, built Salesforce-native forecasting dashboards, and partnered directly with Sales leadership to scale GTM operations—exactly what you're building. Given Gong's global footprint and complexity, I'd love to explore how my experience architecting scalable territory frameworks could accelerate your regional expansion.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed grant-management SaaS startup with 5,000+ nonprofit clients, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or GTM systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, APIs, workflows), CRM administration experience (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience across the tech stack.
score_reason: Strong technical RevOps fit with ideal remote setup and HubSpot/CRM architecture expertise matching core requirements. Slight concern: nonprofit/grant-management vertical differs from Omri's B2B SaaS fintech background, and early-stage company (5K clients) may be below typical scope for senior executive targeting Head-level roles.
ai_opener: Instrumentl's approach to modernizing nonprofit operations through AI-native GTM architecture caught my attention—I've spent 15+ years building revenue infrastructure at B2B SaaS scale. Your focus on data model architecture and AI tool integration across sales processes aligns perfectly with how I've structured CRM ecosystems at previous companies. I'd be interested in exploring how my experience scaling technical RevOps infrastructure could accelerate your growth trajectory.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Customer Operations
description: Later seeks a Revenue Operations Manager for Customer Operations to build a unified customer health measurement framework across product lines and partner with central RevOps and Systems teams on platform enhancements, integrations, and automation. Requires 4+ years in Revenue, Sales, Business, or Customer Operations within SaaS or professional services, proven ability to design cross-functional processes, strong Salesforce command including reporting and data modeling, and experience with capacity planning and forecasting. The role involves building Sales-to-Services handoff processes and pipeline-to-capacity forecasting models.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps core competencies (Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, cross-functional process design, capacity planning) and B2B SaaS background. Role is slightly customer-ops focused rather than pure GTM, but still within Omri's wheelhouse and leverages his operational infrastructure expertise.

With deep Salesforce expertise and a track record scaling pipeline-to-capacity forecasting models, I'd be well-positioned to architect the Sales-to-Services handoff processes and integrations that unlock visibility across your customer lifecycle.

title: Staff GTM Engineer (AI & Automation)
description: Grafana Labs seeks a Staff GTM Engineer to build next-generation AI agent and workflow systems, spending most time writing code, designing multi-agent architectures, integrating LLM APIs, and shipping automation across Marketing, RevOps, and SDR teams. Requires 7+ years building production systems, 2+ years applying LLMs/AI to production workflows, strong Python and JavaScript/Node.js skills, deep familiarity with Google Cloud Platform and BigQuery, and fluency with AI-assisted development tools. Omri's strengths are in RevOps strategy, pipeline forecasting, and GTM operations—not software engineering architecture.

However, I should be transparent: my expertise is in designing GTM systems and RevOps strategy, not in building the underlying software architecture. I'd be a stronger strategic partner than individual contributor for this scope.
